title: rootless: configuration mismatch tempdir
body:
**Is this a BUG REPORT or FEATURE REQUEST? (leave only one on its own line)**
/kind bug

**Description**
When not specifying `--tmpdir` on a blank system, there's a configuration mismatch on default values.

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**
1. Install _podman_ and all other tools and libs as user under `/home/tobwen/podman/usr/local/` on a brand new VM.

2. Execute
```
./podman --conmon /home/tobwen/podman/usr/local/bin/conmon --runtime /home/tobwen/podman/usr/local/bin/runc --network-cmd-path /home/tobwen/podman/usr/local/bin/slirp4netns run hello-world
```

**Describe the results you received:**
```
DEBU[0003] using conmon: "/home/tobwen/podman/usr/local/bin/conmon"
DEBU[0003] Initializing boltdb state at /home/tobwen/.local/share/containers/storage/libpod/bolt_state.db
DEBU[0003] Overriding run root "/tmp/run-1000" with "/tmp/user/1000" from database
DEBU[0003] Using graph driver vfs
DEBU[0003] Using graph root /home/tobwen/.local/share/containers/storage
DEBU[0003] Using run root /tmp/user/1000
DEBU[0003] Using static dir /home/tobwen/.local/share/containers/storage/libpod
DEBU[0003] Using tmp dir /tmp/run-1000/libpod/tmp
DEBU[0003] Using volume path /home/tobwen/.local/share/containers/storage/volumes
ERRO[0003] could not get runtime: database libpod temporary files directory (tmpdir) "/tmp/user/1000/libpod/tmp" does not match our libpod temporary files directory (tmpdir) "/tmp/run-1000/libpod/tmp": database configuration mismatch
```

**Describe the results you expected:**
Use `/tmp/user/1000/libpod/tmp` as default. `/tmp/run-1000/libpod/tmp` seems to be outdated.

**Additional information you deem important (e.g. issue happens only occasionally):**
I think, we fixed this about a year ago. Maybe a regression?
Heck, after finishing this bug report, I found the old one: https://github.com/containers/libpod/issues/2661

**Output of `podman version`:**
```
Version:            1.6.3-dev
RemoteAPI Version:  1
Go Version:         go1.11.5
OS/Arch:            linux/amd64
```

**Output of `podman info --debug`:**
```

tobwen@pgsql:~/podman/usr/local/bin$ ./podman --tmpdir /tmp/user/1000/libpod/tmp info debug
Error: `podman system info` takes no arguments
tobwen@pgsql:~/podman/usr/local/bin$ ./podman --tmpdir /tmp/user/1000/libpod/tmp info --debug

  Distribution:

  IDMappings:

```
n/a (built manually)

**Additional environment details (AWS, VirtualBox, physical, etc.):**

comments.body:
this should be fixed by fa9982b87ece21baafa08e0c17ca935ce29d7022

Please reopen if it is still happening
